pace_cleanup_no_response.label: PACE Cleanup No Response
pace_cleanup_no_response.description: Inject cleanup no_response and query the PACE error queue.

relay_stuck.label: Relay Stuck
relay_stuck.description: Inject relay stuck and force a route mismatch.

thermometer_stale.label: Thermometer Stale
thermometer_stale.description: Set the thermometer to stale reference quality.

mode2_active_read.label: MODE2 Active Read
mode2_active_read.description: Switch to MODE2, enable active send, and read one frame.

partial_frame.label: Analyzer Partial Frame
partial_frame.description: Switch to MODE2 active send and inject a partial-frame fault.

set_pressure.label: Set Pressure
set_pressure.description: Apply the current target pressure input to PACE.

stable.label: GRZ Stable
stable.description: Return GRZ to a stable state.

reach_target.label: Reach Target
reach_target.description: Return the chamber to the stable target state.

all_off.label: All Off
all_off.description: Turn all target relay channels off.

route_h2o.label: Route H2O
route_h2o.description: Switch relays to the H2O route.

route_co2.label: Route CO2
route_co2.description: Switch relays to the CO2 route.

stable.label: Thermometer Stable
stable.description: Return the thermometer to a stable state.

stable.label: Pressure Stable
stable.description: Return the pressure gauge to a stable state.
